summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Mawana Digital Services Admin Dashboard. All backend APIs (13 tests) passed. All frontend features working correctly - login, data display, filters, tabs, export buttons, and logout.

issues: Minor: Total counts displayed as 6 contacts and 2 leads, but user expected 5 contacts and 1 lead - additional test data may have been added during testing

Backend APIs fully tested with pytest.
